name: Senolytics Scaffold Bootstrap
summary: Initial candidate change representing one source-backed senolytics evidence slice in the new repository. This legacy scaffold candidate is rejected for promotion because accepted narrower repair candidates now preserve the unresolved source-fidelity, synthesis-boundary, and taxonomy-mapping work without leaving the stale scaffold proposal in the active reconciliation set.

scope.question: Can the new evidence-synthesis scaffold validate a minimal senolytics vertical slice?

proposed_records.rationale: Repairs candidate ledger completeness for the agentic review vocabulary update.
Canonical source anchor for the senolytics scaffold.
Study-level representation of the foundational senolytic discovery work.
Atomic source-backed finding used to exercise the evidence graph.
Keeps the scaffold source-fidelity review in the agent-owned review vocabulary.
Keeps the scaffold session in the agent-owned selection vocabulary.
